required_preferences.fact: Plays chess online with his group most Saturday nights except when attending consortium board meetings; occasionally joins in-person ad hoc games with peers during strategy retreats, despite previous avoidance of local clubs

supersedes.fact: Plays chess online with the same group every Saturday night — never participates in local chess clubs

required_preferences.fact: Suspends weekly lunch hours with his spouse for the summer — arranges occasional weekend meetups when she is available from her teaching fellowship

supersedes.fact: Schedules a weekly lunch hour with his spouse — never cancels except for last-minute travel

required_preferences.fact: Declines offers to split appetizers or order shared entrees at work dinners unless ingredients and sodium levels are made explicit, prioritizing menu transparency
Initiates daily morning crisis standups with cross-functional leaders and external consultants until automated systems are restored after the cybersecurity breach
Prefers audiobooks about industrial history during solo travel — never listens to music in the car when alone
Participates in monthly evening board meetings for the manufacturing tech consortium, blocking out those nights and declining other social or family commitments at those times

persona: An executive at a manufacturing firm overseeing digital transformation initiatives
